Package global.thalion.ttio.importers

Class BamReader

java.lang.Object
global.thalion.ttio.importers.BamReader
Direct Known Subclasses:
CramReader, SamReader
public class BamReader extends Object
SAM/BAM importer — M87.

Wraps the user-installed samtools binary as a subprocess to read SAM and BAM (Sequence Alignment/Map) files into WrittenGenomicRun instances. No htslib source is linked or consulted; SAM/BAM format parsing is from the public SAMv1 specification (https://samtools.github.io/hts-specs).

The subprocess approach mirrors the M53 Bruker timsTOF importer pattern. samtools is a runtime dependency only — the BamReader class is loadable on systems without samtools; only toGenomicRun(String, String, String) requires the binary on PATH (Binding Decision §135).

samtools auto-detects SAM vs BAM format from magic bytes; one parser handles both. The companion SamReader exists as a discoverable convenience alias.

Cross-language equivalents: Python ttio.importers.bam.BamReader, Objective-C TTIOBamReader.

(M87)

  • Constructor Details

    • BamReader

      public BamReader(Path path)

  • Method Details

    • path

      public Path path()
      Returns:
      the path passed at construction time.

    • lastProvenance

      public List<ProvenanceRecord> lastProvenance()
      Returns:
      the @PG-derived provenance records from the most recent toGenomicRun(java.lang.String) call (empty before any call). WrittenGenomicRun does not carry provenance, so this side channel exposes it for the cross-language conformance dump and for callers that need it.

    • toGenomicRun

      public WrittenGenomicRun toGenomicRun(String name) throws IOException
      Default name "genomic_0001", no region filter, no sample override.
      Throws:
      IOException

    • toGenomicRun

      public WrittenGenomicRun toGenomicRun(String name, String region) throws IOException
      No sample override.
      Throws:
      IOException

    • toGenomicRun

      public WrittenGenomicRun toGenomicRun(String name, String region, String sampleName) throws IOException
      Read the BAM/SAM and return a WrittenGenomicRun.
      Parameters:
      name - run name (becomes /study/genomic_runs/<name>).
      region - optional region filter passed verbatim to samtools view ("chr1:1000-2000", "*", etc.).
      sampleName - optional override for sample_name; null means "use first @RG SM:".
      Throws:
      BamReader.SamtoolsNotFoundException - if samtools is not on PATH at first call.
      IOException - if the file is missing, samtools exits non-zero, or a SAM line is malformed.

    • buildSamtoolsViewCommand

      protected List<String> buildSamtoolsViewCommand(String region)
      Build the samtools view -h ... command for this reader.

      Subclasses (CramReader in M88) override to inject --reference <fasta> so reference-compressed CRAM bytes can be reconstituted. Default implementation emits the bare BAM/SAM read invocation with an optional region filter.

      Parameters:
      region - optional region filter passed verbatim to samtools view ("chr1:1000-2000", "*", etc.); null means no filter.
      Returns:
      mutable list of command tokens (caller may further mutate before ProcessBuilder invocation).

    • isSamtoolsAvailable

      public static boolean isSamtoolsAvailable()
      Public probe used by tests' Assumptions.assumeTrue(...) skip-when-missing pattern. Does not throw; returns false if samtools is not callable for any reason.
